creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
It seems the VDA project is dead, the last patch was for 2.11.x (only the path was changed in all 2.11.x patches which is no issue with `patch -p1'
For 3.x there are no official patches from the VDA project, perhaps it is time to drop support or for someone using VDA to ping the VDA authors and get commit rights or fork to VDA(3)
